div.div:
This version borrows the look of common AWS architecture diagrams:
- official AWS icons lead the layout
- labels name the actual repo / workflow roles
- boundaries stay light and neutral
- cyberpunk colors stay in title, notes, and accents only

Current local snapshot keeps game repos nested under /games.
Sibling repositories are also allowed.

div.div: Actual runtime is GitHub Pages-style static delivery, not AWS hosting. The docs flow is company-only; each game publishes its own page.
